task_completion.description: Agent navigates from the Welcome screen to the drug search or selection interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Cancer iChart app is visible on a screen other than the initial Welcome screen, showing options or lists to select cancer drugs and co-medications.
The text 'Crizotinib' is visible as a selected item, checked box, or entered search term in the cancer drug section of the app.
The text 'Ketoconazole' is visible as a selected item, checked box, or entered search term in the co-medication section of the app.

task_completion.description: Agent views the interaction result for the two selected drugs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays a result screen showing both 'Crizotinib' and 'Ketoconazole' together, along with a red banner indicating the interaction severity.

task_completion.description: Agent reports the exact interaction recommendation provided by the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent's final output (e.g., in a terminal, text editor, or submission box) contains the exact phrase 'Do Not Coadminister'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Cancer iChart Archive app GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the actual graphical user interface of the Cancer iChart app, not just using terminal commands, reading source files, or extracting strings.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a web browser to bypass the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no web browser open searching for 'Crizotinib and Ketoconazole interaction'; the result must be obtained directly from the local app.

integrity.description: Agent derived the answer from the app screen rather than hallucinating or hardcoding it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must have visibly reached the red 'Do Not Coadminister' screen in the app before typing or outputting the final answer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Cancer iChart app displays a red banner with the exact text 'Do Not Coadminister' for the interaction between Crizotinib and Ketoconazole. Verify that the agent reaches this specific result screen in the app and reports this exact recommendation.
